headline: Netflix Bets On AI Filmmaking As InterPositive Deal Reshapes Valuation Story
summary: Netflix acquired Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking start up InterPositive shortly after stepping away from a potential Warner Bros. Discovery deal. The transaction includes Affleck joining Netflix as a senior technology advisor and expanding his creative partnership with the platform. Netflix is directing capital from a recent breakup fee into AI driven production tools rather than traditional studio assets. For investors watching NasdaqGS:NFLX, this move relates directly to how the company...
